## Meeting Purpose

[Weekly check-in to discuss content progress, strategies, and collaborations between Ramp and GrowthX.](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=2.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [44 articles ready for staging; 18 on best business credit cards pending feedback](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [New AI-generated content workflow shows significant improvement in tone and conversational style](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Plan to accelerate expense category content refresh: 15 articles/day, aiming for 75/week](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)
  - [Exploring cross-linking opportunities with partners like Reddit, Deep Gram, and Home Base](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Discussing potential for leveraging Ramp's advertising spend data for unique content creation](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)

## Topics

### Content Progress and Performance

  - [44 articles ready for staging, including 18 on best business credit cards](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=69.0)
  - [53 published articles performing well, with premium pages showing strong results](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=116.0)
  - [New AI workflow producing more conversational, on-brand content](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=196.0)
  - [Aiming to complete 300 expense category refreshes by end of November (15/day, 75/week)](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=393.0)

### Publishing Bottlenecks and Solutions

  - [Main bottleneck identified as the publishing process in CMS](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=510.0)
  - [Marcel offered to allocate resources from their team to handle publishing, removing this bottleneck](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=572.0)
  - [Luke mentioned upcoming tool to publish directly from Google Docs](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=540.0)

### Cross-Linking and Partnership Opportunities

  - [Potential for cross-linking with partners like Reddit, Deep Gram, and Home Base](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=1025.0)
  - [Discussing creation of a "Tinder for backlinks" to facilitate link exchanges](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)
  - [Exploring content collaborations, especially around advertising trends and spend data](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=1105.0)
  - [Jimmy showcased successful backlink strategy results from another client (Firework)](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=1347.0)

### Data-Driven Content Strategies

  - [Discussing potential use of Ramp's anonymized advertising spend data for unique content](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=1124.0)
  - [Exploring tools like DataGrid or Hex for efficient data analysis and content generation](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)
  - [Considering AI agents to generate insights from large datasets](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=1279.0)

### Content Style and Tone Adjustments

  - [Demonstrated more "edgy" content style options for consideration](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=1622.0)
  - [Emphasis on flexibility in adapting to different tones and styles as needed](https://fathom.video/share/q6yUWspoVhRACfK-vqwNWw5ksmZWKxYN?tab=summary&timestamp=1646.0)
